parameters.query:
select md.*, pd.procedure_name
from mes.machine_data md 
join mes.procedure_detail pd on md.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id
where md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}' 
and pd.procedure_name in ('SN与UUID绑定','SN与屏批次号绑定','SN与电池二维码绑定', '半成品功能测试2-触摸/WIFI/蓝牙/耳机', '成品功能测试-气压计校准测试/充电电流/功耗测试', '信息备注','FQC测试','合彩盒，装封套、称重','中框SN与FPC ID绑定','PPG点胶-保压结束','半成品气压计校准','气压计校准','成品返投工艺流程确认','SN与PPG批次绑定','SN与中框ID绑定')
order by md.createtime desc

select * from  mes.machine_data md 
where md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}' and 
procedure_detail_id in 
(select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name in ('物料解除绑定','包装数据删除'))
order by md.createtime desc

nodes.name: 错误信息：sn或单据编号不能为空

parameters.query: select * from mes.retroid r where r.retroid = '{{ $json.body.sn }}' and r.status in('1','2')

SELECT *
FROM mes.machine_data md
WHERE
  md.data ->> 'material' = '{{ $json.bind_id }}'
  AND (
       '{{ $json.procedure_name }}' != 'PPG点胶-保压结束'
      OR  (md.createtime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::text < '{{ $json.createtime }}'
      )
ORDER BY md.createtime DESC
LIMIT 1;

select md.*, pd.procedure_name
from mes.machine_data md 
join mes.procedure_detail pd on md.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id
where md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}' 
and pd.procedure_name in ('半成品ATE测试','半成品光感测试','ATE测试','音频测试','光感测试','半成品MIC测试','成品光感测试','RF测试','音频测试','气密性测试','半成品气压计校准','气压计校准')
order by md.createtime desc

-- 第一部分：绑定操作
SELECT md.machine_data_id, md.retroid_id, md.procedure_detail_id, md.history_procedure_id, 
       md.user_id, md.machine_id, md."data"::text AS "data", md.createtime, md.data_type, 
       pd.procedure_name
FROM mes.machine_data md 
JOIN mes.procedure_detail pd ON md.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id
WHERE md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}' 
AND pd.procedure_name IN ('SN与屏批次号绑定','中框SN与FPC ID绑定','PPG点胶-保压结束')

UNION ALL -- 使用UNION ALL避免去重开销

-- 第二部分：解除绑定操作（直接JOIN，避免子查询）
SELECT md.machine_data_id, md.retroid_id, md.procedure_detail_id, md.history_procedure_id, 
       md.user_id, md.machine_id, md."data"::text AS "data", md.createtime, md.data_type, 
       NULL AS procedure_name
FROM mes.machine_data md 
JOIN mes.procedure_detail pd ON md.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id -- 添加JOIN
WHERE md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}' 
AND pd.procedure_name IN ('物料解除绑定','包装数据删除')
AND md."data"->>'unblind_name' IN ('SN与屏批次号解绑', '中框SN与FPC ID解绑','PPG点胶-保压结束')

ORDER BY createtime DESC; -- 保持排序

nodes.name: 查该sn的辅料绑定类数据

parameters.content:
类型0为工厂解绑数据查询用
类型1为npi通过sn查询绑定数据用
类型2为工厂查询普通绑定查询

parameters.query:
select * from mes.retroid r where r.retroid = '{{ $json.body.sn }}' and r.status = 0 
order by r.createtime ASC 
limit 1
